raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the core concept (homography augmentation for semantic segmentation) and proposes a reframing that addresses the mismatch between the abstract's claims and the actual experiments.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (DeepLabv3+) and articulates the delta in terms of mIoU improvement, but does not map against other relevant works or identify sharp vs rhetorical differences.",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (same-viewpoint benchmark results instead of cross-viewpoint evaluation).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (unvalidated deployment recipe for driving stacks) but does not propose a reframing.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the core concept (homography augmentation for semantic segmentation) and proposes a reframing that addresses the mismatch between the abstract's claims and the actual experiments.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (DeepLabv3+) and articulates the delta in terms of mIoU improvement, but does not map against other relevant works or identify sharp vs rhetorical differences.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (same-viewpoint benchmark results instead of cross-viewpoint evaluation).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (unvalidated deployment recipe for driving stacks) but does not propose a reframing.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
